# Inline HTML

## Basic HTML Elements

<p>This is a paragraph using HTML tags.</p>

<div style="border: 1px solid #ccc; padding: 1em; border-radius: 4px;">
  <strong>This is a styled div</strong> with inline styles.
</div>

## Details/Summary

<details>
<summary>Click to expand</summary>

This content is hidden by default.

- Item 1
- Item 2
- Item 3

```javascript
console.log("Hidden code block");
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Another collapsible section</summary>

### Heading inside details

Paragraph content inside a details element.

</details>

## Definition List with HTML

<dl>
  <dt>Term 1</dt>
  <dd>Definition for term 1</dd>
  <dt>Term 2</dt>
  <dd>Definition for term 2</dd>
</dl>

## Keyboard Shortcuts

Press <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>C</kbd> to copy.

Press <kbd>Cmd</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>P</kbd> to open command palette.

## Abbreviation

<abbr title="Hypertext Markup Language">HTML</abbr> is the standard markup language.

## Superscript and Subscript

H<sub>2</sub>O is water.

E = mc<sup>2</sup> is Einstein's famous equation.

## Mark (Highlight)

This is <mark>highlighted text</mark> using the mark element.

## Line Break

First line<br>Second line<br>Third line

## Mixed Markdown and HTML

<div>

**Bold Markdown inside HTML div**

- List inside div
- Another item

</div>

## Comment

<!-- This is an HTML comment and should not be visible -->

Text after comment.

<!--
  Multi-line comment
  that spans several lines
-->

Text after multi-line comment.
